news.headline: Research by Leading NOW reveals 9 Critical Differentiators™ for career success. Focus on retaining women in leadership roles.
news.summary: A recent study has outlined crucial steps to combat the decline of women in top leadership positions. Conducted by Leading NOW, a renowned advisor on fostering inclusive environments, the research offers key insights to address this issue. This study comes at a critical time, as statistics show a concerning decrease in the number of women occupying senior leadership roles. The findings, released in Boston on October 23, 2024, aim to guide organizations in promoting gender equality within their leadership teams.

news.headline: Fairview, Texas will host a ribbon-cutting ceremony for Fairview Crossing, a new four-lane divided road, to boost future development and commercial corridor.
news.summary: In Fairview, Texas, on October 23, 2024, the Town of Fairview revealed the opening of Fairview Crossing, a new four-lane divided road aiming to act as a gateway for future development and a commercial corridor. This announcement marks a significant milestone for the town's infrastructure, promoting growth and connectivity. The ribbon-cutting ceremony is scheduled to celebrate this achievement and propel the town towards enhanced economic opportunities.

news.headline: HinduPACT's HinduVote launches website for evaluating US candidates, empowering Hindu voters with insights.
news.summary: A new website has been launched by HinduPACT's HinduVote, part of the World Hindu Council of America (VHPA), in Chicago on October 23, 2024. This platform aims to provide comprehensive information on candidates running for the US House and Senate, targeting American Hindu voters. The initiative is set to empower voters with a multidimensional analysis of candidates, enhancing their understanding of the political landscape.

news.headline: Morales Plastic Surgery debuts new Motiva breast implants, FDA-approved in Sep 2024, for advanced cosmetic procedures.
news.summary: In Houston on October 23, 2024, Morales Plastic Surgery unveiled the latest in cosmetic enhancement with the introduction of Motiva breast implants. These cutting-edge implants, recently FDA-approved in September 2024, offer a state-of-the-art option for breast augmentation. This innovative procedure from Morales Plastic Surgery showcases their commitment to providing advanced cosmetic solutions and enhancing their offerings.

news.headline: The global Green Methanol Market is projected to reach $11.1 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 33.8%. Demand is driven by cutting greenhouse gas emissions and government policies aimed at promoting renewable energy. Biomass is the leading feedstock, and North America is expected to see the highest CAGR.
news.summary: The article discusses the growth projection of the Green Methanol Market, increasing from USD 1.9 billion in 2024 to USD 11.1 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 33.8%. The rise is attributed to the focus on reducing greenhouse gas emissions, driving demand for green methanol as a sustainable substitute for fossil fuel-derived methanol. Government policies supporting renewable energy use are also boosting investment in the market. Key players include OCI N.V., Carbon Recycling International Inc., Methanex Corporation, Proman, and Södra. Drivers include the demand for sustainable energy sources, with biomass as the leading feedstock, and opportunities lie in using green methanol in marine and manufacturing sectors. Restraints are seen in competing fuel options, while challenges involve infrastructure and production efficiency. North America is expected to see the highest CAGR.

news.headline: Motorcar Parts of America to present at Gabelli Funds 48th Annual Automotive Aftermarket Symposium on 11/5/2024 at 1:00pm PT. Register to view fireside chat.
news.summary: A public statement was released by Motorcar Parts of America, Inc. (Nasdaq:MPAA) stating their upcoming fireside chat presentation at Gabelli Funds 48th Annual Automotive Aftermarket Symposium in Las Vegas. The event is set to take place on Tuesday, November 5, 2024, at 1:00 p.m. Pacific time. Registration is required in advance to view the fireside chat, accessible through the provided link: https://www.gabelli.com/conferences/automotive_symposium. This symposium aligns with the company’s involvement in the Automot industry.

news.headline: La Rosa's 9M revenue hits $45 million, up 120% from 2023. aiming for profitability by 2025.
news.summary: La Rosa Holdings Corp (NASDAQ: LRHC) revealed their preliminary unaudited revenue for the initial nine months of 2024, amounting to approximately $45 million. This shows a significant surge of about 120% in revenue compared to the corresponding period in 2023. Joe La Rosa, the CEO of La Rosa, noted that their growth had quickened during this timeframe due to outstanding year-over-year progress. Additionally, the company has recently restructured its debt and deferred payments to support expansion plans and enhance revenue generation. For more details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Zendure reaffirms commitment to sustainability on World Energy Day 2024 amid rising energy costs and environmental concerns. #Dusseldorf #Zendure #sustainability
news.summary: On October 23rd, 2024 in Düsseldorf, Germany, Zendure, a rapidly expanding energy technology firm, marked World Energy Day by restating its dedication to sustainability and energy autonomy. With energy expenses increasing and environmental issues becoming more pressing, Zendure's groundbreaking energy solutions seek to address these challenges.

news.headline: Coca-Cola beats Q3 earnings with $11.9 billion sales, sees 10% Q4 revenue growth despite volume decline.
news.summary: Coca-Cola Company (NYSE: KO) announced on Wednesday a 1% year-on-year decrease in third-quarter 2024 sales, amounting to $11.9 billion. This surpassed the analyst consensus forecast of $11.59 billion. Notable figures included a 10% increase in price/mix and a 2% drop in concentrate sales. Concentrate sales lagged behind unit case volume by 1 point, largely due to timing issues with concentrate shipments. The adjusted operating margin for the quarter was 30.7%, up from 29.7% the previous year. This increase was attributed to a $919 million charge linked to reevaluating the contingent consideration liability to fair value.

news.headline: DarioHealth (Nasdaq: DRIO) to report Q3 2024 results on Nov 7 at 8:30am ET. Company is global digital health leader.
news.summary: DarioHealth Corp. (Nasdaq: DRIO), a prominent figure in digital health, is set to unveil its financial results for the third quarter concluding in September. The Company disclosed that it will hold a conference call and webcast at 8:30am ET on October 23, 2024, to discuss these results.

news.headline: Billings Clinic-Logan Health expands Oracle Health EHR to 30 hospitals, improving care quality and efficiency with AI.
news.summary: Increased deployment of an AI-powered Oracle Clinical Digital Assistant in Austin, Texas has led to improved patient access to integrated care and operational efficiencies. This initiative aims to enhance care quality by reducing administrative tasks, allowing physicians to allocate more time to patients. The deployment helps in streamlining operations and promoting better overall patient outcomes.

news.headline: Developers are addressing AI data center challenges amid data revolution. Market impacted by data-intensive AI apps.
news.summary: Avant Technologies Inc., based in the USA, released information through the Vancouver, BC USA News Group on October 23, 2024. Over the past years, the market has experienced a significant shift towards data-centric operations, primarily due to the rise of data-heavy technologies such as artificial intelligence. This transformation has been swift, with a notable increase in...

news.headline: Nucleus Security launches POAM process automation to help federal agencies reduce operational overhead.
news.summary: A unified vulnerability management solution by Nucleus Security is aiding federal agencies and suppliers in reducing operational costs, ensuring compliance, and enhancing risk management efficiency. The integration was unveiled on October 23, 2024, in SARASOTA, Fla. Nucleus Security's innovation is providing a comprehensive approach to tackling vulnerabilities and is expected to significantly impact operational overhead.

news.headline: NCSolutions partners with Amazon Ads to offer CPG brands better customer journey insights, with access to Amazon Marketing Cloud analytics.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from New York on October 23, 2024, NCSolutions (NCS) unveiled a collaboration that will offer consumer packaged goods (CPG) brands the opportunity to tap into a fresh array of analytical insights within the Amazon Marketing Cloud. This partnership aims to enhance advertising effectiveness by providing attribution and analytics tools to CPG companies. This move signifies a strategic step towards leveraging data-driven strategies, with the potential to transform marketing performance for brands.

news.headline: New study by Corporate Insight finds best practices for digital front doors among health systems. Report examines leading organizations.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Corporate Insight (CI) in New York on October 23, 2024, highlights the top organizations in the health sector and provides practical recommendations for enhancing digital front doors within health systems. The report, titled The Health System Monitor: Where to Get Care Information and Resources, delves into essential insights aimed at improving the efficiency and performance of digital platforms within the healthcare industry. This study offers valuable insights on the best practices to adopt in order to optimize digital interfaces within health systems.

news.headline: ONE Group Hospitality, Inc. opens new STK Steakhouse in Aventura, Florida at 19505 Biscayne Blvd, offering Vibe Dining experience.
news.summary: In Denver today, The ONE Group Hospitality, Inc. revealed the launch of the latest STK Steakhouse in Aventura, Florida. Situated at 19505 Biscayne Blvd., this new restaurant showcases Vibe Dining in one of South Florida's prime areas, offering elevated culinary experiences, renowned cocktails, and live music from top DJs. With this being a company-owned establishment, STK Aventura marks the second STK restaurant to open.

news.headline: Collins Aerospace signs a 10-year, $787 million MRO contract with Air Europa, expanding their 787 services.
news.summary: A major development in the growth of Collins' 787 Maintenance, Repair, and Overhaul (MRO) services in Europe has been achieved with a new agreement. In Barcelona, Spain, on October 23, 2024, Collins Aerospace, a business under RTX (NYSE: RTX), revealed a significant deal with Air Europa. This 10-year contract will involve Collins Aerospace delivering a comprehensive range of maintenance, repair, and overhaul services for Air Europa.

news.headline: RESAAS enhances CODE platform with AI to ease data integration for real estate industry. TSXV: RSS, OTCQB: RSASF.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 23, 2024, RESAAS Services Inc. unveiled a significant enhancement to its newly introduced Commercial Data Exchange platform (CODE). A prominent technology provider for the real estate sector, RESAAS (TSXV: RSS) (OTCQB: RSASF) shared details of the upgrade.

news.headline: Ontra launches automated CTA filing for private fund managers, expanding its entity management solution.
news.summary: Ontra, a top provider of legal technology solutions for private capital investment firms, has unveiled an enhanced feature to its entity management solution on October 23, 2024, in San Francisco. This new functionality, powered by AI, aims to further advance Ontra's position in the industry.

news.headline: Precision Medicine Group appoints Karl Deonanan as CFO and Matt DeZee as Chief Transformation & Strategy Officer in 2024.
news.summary: In recent news, Karl Deonanan has been named the Chief Financial Officer and Matt DeZee has been appointed to the newly created position of Chief Transformation and Strategy Officer at a company located in Bethesda, Maryland. The company, Precision Medicine Group (Precision), is a prominent player in the field of drug development. The announcement was made on October 23, 2024. These appointments reflect a strategic move within the organization to enhance its operational and strategic capabilities.

news.headline: Fathom Holdings schedules Q3 earnings call for Nov. 7, 2024, at 5 p.m. ET [CARY, N.C., Nasdaq: FTHM] via PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Cary, North Carolina on October 23, 2024, Fathom Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: FTHM) announced their status as a national real estate services platform. Fathom is a technology-focused company that offers a range of services such as residential brokerage, mortgage, title, and SaaS products for brokerages and agents. They are slated to host an event.

news.headline: SeaStar Medical's trial at Stanford Medicine now active, 12 sites enrolling subjects, reaching 52 enrollees.
news.summary: SeaStar Medical Holding Corporation has disclosed that Stanford Medicine has been approved to start enrolling subjects in the NEUTRALIZE-AKI pivotal trial. The company, listed as ICU on Nasdaq, specializes in medical devices to combat the effects of hyperinflammation on organs. Following the inclusion of two Department of Defense medical centers, a total of 12 sites are now operational for subject enrollment in the trial. Currently, there are 52 subjects enrolled in the trial.

news.headline: 70% of fintechs report increased fraud due to synthetic identities and Gen AI, making detection harder.
news.summary: The latest data indicates that 70% of financial technology companies have experienced a rise in fraudulent activities due to the challenge of identifying synthetic identities. This information was shared by IDology, a subsidiary of GBG, based in Atlanta. The report, released on October 23, 2024, underscores the increase in fraud driven by generative artificial intelligence (Gen AI).

news.headline: The Paper Store marks 60 years with $60 million growth plan, updating stores across the Northeast.
news.summary: A retail brand, The Paper Store, known for transforming shopping into an enjoyable experience, is marking its 60th anniversary. It has revamped its locations in the Northeast and announced a significant investment plan of $60 million over the next five years.

news.headline: Trio Petroleum Corp appoints James Blake to Board of Directors, enhancing financial expertise. Blake managed $750M in assets.
news.summary: In Bakersfield, California on October 23, 2024, Trio Petroleum Corp. (NYSE American: "TPET") welcomed James Blake to its Board of Directors. With 30 years in finance and a Bachelor of Commerce from the University of Alberta, Blake is a Chartered Financial Analyst (CFA) who recently managed a $750 million portfolio at a prominent Canadian bank before retiring. His expertise in financial markets, investment strategies, and risk management will greatly benefit Trio Petroleum.

news.headline: Aprea Therapeutics discusses APR-1051 at conference; Phase 1 trial ongoing in US, targeting patients with unmet needs.
news.summary: The Phase 1 clinical trial ACESOT-1051 is currently investigating the efficacy of APR-1051 as a sole treatment for patients facing a critical medical requirement. Active enrollment is in progress at three locations in the United States.

news.headline: Stellantis invests $29.5 million in wind tunnel technology to improve EV aerodynamics and increase range.
news.summary: Today in Auburn Hills, Michigan, a significant investment of $29.5 million has been announced to enhance the capabilities of the renowned Stellantis wind tunnel. This investment will incorporate Moving Ground Plane (MGP) technology to improve aerodynamics, decrease drag, and increase the range of electric vehicles. The upgrade will also allow for the measurement and reduction of airflow resistance from wheels.

news.headline: Disney and Magnite renew deal for two years, expanding to include LATAM inventory, podcasts, and live sports in streaming.
news.summary: The streaming service has broadened its reach by incorporating content from Latin America, podcasts, and live sports into its inventory. This expansion allows access to a wider range of shows and events, appealing to a larger audience. The inclusion of Latin American content, podcasts, and live sports enhances the platform's offerings and provides more diverse entertainment options. This strategic move is set to increase the streaming service's appeal and reach, attracting new subscribers and boosting engagement.

news.headline: Soaak Technologies to showcase therapeutic sound compositions for U.S. Air Force on Oct 30, 2024, at event in Tulsa, OK.
news.summary: Soaak Technologies, Inc. will be presenting their innovative therapeutic sound frequency compositions as a way to boost operational wellness within the U.S. Air Force's Air Mobility Command in Tulsa, Oklahoma. The showcase is scheduled for October 23, 2024. Soaak Technologies is a health-tech company focused on leveraging sound frequencies for wellness benefits.

news.headline: Mason's Famous Lobster Rolls opens new kiosk in Fort Lauderdale's Marina Village at Bahia Mar. Enjoy lobster rolls in open-air setting.
news.summary: Enjoy America's most beloved lobster rolls within a distinctive open-air environment in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. On October 23, 2024, Mason's Famous Lobster Rolls, a fast-casual establishment known for serving top-quality Maine lobster nationwide, revealed the inauguration of its latest location.

news.headline: Trust Stamp (Nasdaq: IDAI) launches Biometric Secure Module (BSM) project for contactless palm authentication, enhancing security.
news.summary: Trust Stamp (Nasdaq: IDAI) based in Atlanta, GA, disclosed on Oct. 23, 2024, the initiation of a cutting-edge research endeavor to broaden its biometric cryptosystem, Stable IT2. The focus will be on integrating contactless palm authentication into their system. This initiative, known as the Biometric Secure Module (BSM) project, aims to bolster security measures by combining face and palm biometrics. By doing so, Trust Stamp is moving towards a more secure and privacy-focused authentication system, thus enhancing resilience in safeguarding sensitive data.

news.headline: Sunrun partners with Orange and Rockland Utilities to create NY's largest residential power plant using rooftop solar and batteries.
news.summary: One of the pioneering initiatives in New York State, this innovative program involves a residential distributed power plant that provides essential energy to the electric grid through the combination of rooftop solar panels and on-site batteries. This program stands out as one of the first of its kind in the state.

news.headline: ResVita Bio had a successful FDA INTERACT meeting on 8/10/24 for RVB-003 therapy for Netherton Syndrome. #FDA #ResVitaBio
news.summary: A meeting was held on August 10, 2024 by ResVita Bio, a company based in Berkeley, California, specializing in synthetic biology. The meeting with the FDA INTERACT was successful and centered around the development plan for RVB-003, ResVita Bio's innovative therapy for skin diseases. The company is known for developing cutting-edge therapies in this field.

news.headline: Vimeo launches spatial app for Apple Vision Pro, allows users to view, upload, and share spatial videos globally.
news.summary: Members of the Vimeo community are now able to share their spatial content with a global audience. This move allows creators to showcase their work to viewers everywhere.

news.headline: One Stop Systems will report Q3 2024 results on Nov 6, 2024, 10:00 a.m. ET in a conference call.
news.summary: A conference call is scheduled to take place on Wednesday, November 6, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Evoke Pharma to present award-winning research at ACG Annual Scientific Meeting in Philadelphia, from Oct 25-29, 2024. (283)
news.summary: A pharmaceutical company, Evoke Pharma, Inc., is set to showcase poster presentations at the American College of Gastroenterology (ACG) Annual Scientific Meeting in Philadelphia from October 25-29, 2024. Specializing in treatments for gastrointestinal (GI) diseases, with a focus on Gimoti® (metoclopramide) nasal spray, the company is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EVOK. This announcement was made in Solana Beach, California, on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Global Oil and Gas Construction Project report for Q2 2024 offers insights on top 20 projects per region with total project values and key operators.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Project Insight - Global Oil and Gas Construction Projects (Q2 2024)" has been released and is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report offers in-depth analysis of construction projects in the oil and gas industry worldwide. It includes total project values, breakdown by stage and funding across all regions. The report highlights the top 20 projects in each region, detailing the country, stage, and project value. Additionally, it ranks the key operators in the sector and identifies the leading contractors. This comprehensive analysis provides valuable insights for industry professionals and investors.

news.headline: Calidi Biotherapeutics announces $2 million offering, selling 2,050,000 shares at $1 each to institutional investors.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Calidi Biotherapeutics, Inc. revealed that it has signed a definitive securities purchase agreement with specific institutional investors. The agreement involves the acquisition and sale of 2,050,000 shares of the company’s common stock at a rate of $1.00 per share in a registered direct offering. Calidi, a clinical-stage biotechnology firm focused on developing targeted immunotherapies, made this announcement.

news.headline: Global Partners LP declares $0.73 cash distribution per unit ($2.92 annually) on common units for Q3 2024. Record date: Nov 8.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Global Partners LP (NYSE: GLP) has declared a cash distribution of $0.7300 per unit ($2.92 annually) on all outstanding common units for the period of July 1, 2024, to September 30, 2024. This distribution by the Board of Directors of its general partner, Global GP LLC, is set to be paid on November 14, 2024, to unitholders recorded as of the business close on November 8, 2024.

news.headline: FICO partners with TCS to offer efficiency gains through analytics. Global impact in various industries using FICO® Platform.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has been established between FICO, a prominent global analytics software company, and Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), a renowned global provider of IT services, consulting, and business solutions. This strategic partnership aims to provide advanced optimization and decision management solutions to various industries across the globe. TCS will leverage FICO's cutting-edge FICO® Platform, a low-code/no-code solution tailored for analytics-driven decision automation and mathematical optimization. This innovative initiative is set to revolutionize decision-making processes for businesses worldwide.

news.headline: Stem Inc. appoints Albert Hofeldt as new CTO (Chief Technology Officer), oversaw technology innovation since 2022.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Stem Inc., a prominent player in AI-driven clean energy solutions, revealed Albert Hofeldt, PhD as their new Chief Technology Officer. He will now report to interim CEO David Buzby. Formerly the Executive Vice President of Technology, Dr. Hofeldt has effectively overseen the enhancement of the company's technological advancements since 2022. This transition has taken immediate effect and signifies a strategic move for Stem Inc. (NYSE: STEM).

news.headline: Sidus Space's LizzieSat™ NL passes critical design review as part of multimillion-dollar contract with Netherlands Organization.
news.summary: An innovative space company, Sidus Space, has completed the critical design review for LizzieSat™ NL, a laser communication satellite commissioned by The Netherlands Organization (TNO). This achievement marks the confirmation of the satellite design’s technical foundation and also initiates a significant milestone payment in accordance with the multimillion-dollar contract. Sidus Space, listed on NASDAQ as SIDU, is recognized as a dynamic facilitator of space missions.

news.headline: Eric Blake named Head of Latin America at Liquidnet, focusing on expanding business in the region. NewYork based, reports to Alan Polo.
news.summary: Liquidnet, a prominent agency execution specialist driven by technology, has named Eric Blake as the new Head of Latin America. Blake will oversee the company's growth in the region, targeting fresh liquidity sources and providing customized technology solutions to local and international asset managers. With a focus on expanding operations, Blake, based in New York, will report to Alan Polo, the Head of Equities at Liquidnet.

news.headline: Paysafe (NYSE: PSFE) to release Q3 2024 financial results on November 13, with a live webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET. Website: ir.paysafe.com.
news.summary: In London, Paysafe Limited (NYSE: PSFE), a global payments platform, is set to release its third quarter 2024 financial results on November 13, 2024, before the market opens. A live webcast discussing the results will be hosted by management at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. To access the webcast and additional information, visit the investor relations section of the Paysafe website at ir.paysafe.com. Following the event, an archive will be accessible for reference.

news.headline: Manhattan Associates helps Giant Eagle improve distribution with Manhattan Active® Warehouse Management. Giant Eagle transitioned three distribution centers with a successful implementation.
news.summary: Manhattan Associates Inc. shared today that Giant Eagle has effectively adopted Manhattan Active® Warehouse Management (WM), the top cloud-native, evergreen, and adaptable warehouse management solution in the industry. Giant Eagle, counted among the largest food retailers and distributors in the U.S., has smoothly migrated three distribution centers from an on-prem Manhattan WMS to Manhattan Active Warehouse Management. The company aims to transfer more centers in the future.

news.headline: Celularity appeals Nasdaq for compliance, stocks continue trading as "CELU" and warrants as "CELUW."
news.summary: The common stock and warrants of Celularity will be maintained for trading on The Nasdaq Capital Market using the symbols "CELU" and "CELUW" respectively.

news.headline: Singapore-based Orangekloud and ELITC partner to enhance skills development and digital transformation. (Numbers: Oct. 23, 2024, Nasdaq: ORKT)
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Singapore, Orangekloud Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: ORKT) disclosed a recent partnership agreement with the Electronics Industries Training Centre (ELITC), a distinguished institute in Singapore providing training and educational courses. Orangekloud, a tech company based in Singapore, specializes in the eMOBIQ® No-Code platform for mobile app development. This collaboration marks a significant move for the company towards enhancing its offerings by aligning with ELITC’s expertise.

news.headline: Kane Biotech donates 2,000 oz of revyve™ Antimicrobial Wound Gel to aid Ukraine medical relief effort.
news.summary: Kane Biotech Inc., based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, made a recent announcement on October 23, 2024, stating their donation of 2,000 ounces of revyve™ Antimicrobial Wound Gel. The donation is intended for the medical relief effort in Ukraine. Kane Biotech Inc. is listed on the TSX-V as KNE and on the OTCQB as KNBIF.

news.headline: CorMedix Inc. to report Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 30, 2024. Conference call at 8:30am ET. (Nasdaq: CRMD)
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, CorMedix Inc. (Nasdaq: CRMD), a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in therapeutic products for severe ailments, stated it will disclose its financial outcomes for the third quarter of 2024, concluding on September 30, 2024. The report will be released before the market opens on Wednesday, October 30, 2024. A corporate update conference call is scheduled for 8:30am Eastern Time on the same day.

news.headline: Manufacturer picks Bridgeline's HawkSearch for AI-driven e-commerce enhancement w/ Salesforce Commerce Cloud. (Numbers: NASDAQ: BLIN, date: Oct. 23, 2024)
news.summary: In Woburn, Massachusetts on October 23, 2024, Bridgeline Digital, Inc. (NASDAQ: BLIN) revealed that a prominent manufacturer and distributor of life safety products for first responders and law enforcement has chosen HawkSearch to enhance their on-site search and merchandising, utilizing Salesforce Commerce Cloud. This decision signifies a strategic move towards improving user experience and overall efficiency.
